description: An automated alert indicates a P1 critical service outage affecting all customers.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the P1 alert and initiate the incident response protocol.

expected_outcome.value: Agent starts the incident response process, creating a war room and notifying the on-call engineer.

nodes.task_description: Update the public status page to inform customers of the ongoing outage.

expected_outcome.value: Agent posts a clear and timely update to the status page.

nodes.task_description: After engineers find the root cause (e.g., failed deployment), execute the rollback procedure.

expected_outcome.value: Agent coordinates the rollback of the failed deployment.

nodes.task_description: Once service is restored, update the status page again and begin the post-mortem analysis.

expected_outcome.value: Agent marks the incident as resolved and schedules a post-mortem meeting.
